parikriyā (von 1. kar mit pari) f.
1〉 Umschliessung  AK. 3,3,20 .

— 3〉 = parikara 5.  DAŚAR. 1,25 .

results.rendered_html:
parikriyā
1 Enclosing with a fence or ditch, intrenching.
2 Encircling or surrounding in general.
3 (In dramaturgy) = parikara (7)
(pb) q. v.
4 Attention.
